title: Assertion on BATgroup_internal
poc: SELECT subject, attribute, value, MAX(prob) as prob FROM "_attributesString" GROUP BY subject, attribute, value;
key_bug_features: GROUP BY with MAX on CHARACTER LARGE OBJECT
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE "_attributesString" ("subject" INTEGER, "attribute" CHARACTER LARGE OBJECT, "value" CHARACTER LARGE OBJECT, "prob" DOUBLE DEFAULT 1.0);
SELECT subject, attribute, value, MAX(prob) as prob FROM "_attributesString" GROUP BY subject, attribute, value;
